2.label: Smoke Alarm
2.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off when smoke is detected (uses Basic command class).

3.label: Tamper
3.description: Devices in this group will receive notifications when the casing is opened.

4.label: Smoke Alarm BC
4.description: Devices in this group will receive Sensor Alarm reports when smoke is detected. Provides backward compatibility with controllers not supporting Z-Wave+.

5.label: Tamper BC
5.description: Devices in this group will receive Sensor Alarm reports when the casing is opened. Provides backward compatibility with controllers not supporting Z-Wave+.

paramInformation.label: Visual Indicator Notifications: Exceeding Temperature Threshold
Visual Indicator Notifications: Lack of Z-Wave Range
Sound Notifications: Lack of Z-Wave Range
Config of Control Frames in Basic Command Class
paramInformation.description: This parameter defines which frames will be sent in the 2nd association group (Smoke Alarm).

options.label: Basic on and basic off enabled

paramInformation.label: BASIC ON Frame Value
paramInformation.description: BASIC ON frame is sent in case of smoke presence detection and fire alarm triggering.

paramInformation.label: BASIC OFF Frame Value
paramInformation.description: BASIC OFF frame is sent in case of fire alarm cancellation.

paramInformation.label: Alarm Broadcast
paramInformation.description: A value other than 0 means that alarms are being sent in broadcast mode, i.e. to all devices within range. Broadcasts are disabled in Z-Wave network security mode.

options.label: Smoke alarm broadcast active, casing opening inactive
Smoke alarm broadcast inactive, casing opening active
Smoke alarm and casing opening broadcast active

paramInformation.label: Temperature Report Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval between consecutive temperature reports. Report is sent when the new temperature value differs from the previously reported one by the hysteresis (parameter 21).

paramInformation.label: Temperature Report Hysteresis
paramInformation.description: The temperature report will only be sent if there is a difference in temperature value from the previous value reported.

paramInformation.label: Temperature Threshold
paramInformation.description: Temperature above which the excess temperature notification is sent (visual indication/sound/Z-Wave report)

paramInformation.label: Excess Temperature Signaling Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval of signaling (visual indication/sound) excess temperature level

paramInformation.label: Lack of Z-Wave Range Indication Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval of signaling (visual indication/sound) lack of Z-Wave range

metadata.inclusion: Quickly press the B-button located on the device's casing three times.
metadata.exclusion: Quickly press the B-button located on the device's casing three times.
metadata.reset:
1. Press and hold the B-button for 3 seconds until the visual indicator glows white.
2. Release the B-button.
3. Wait until the visual indicator glows yellow, signaling the 4th menu position.
4. Briefly press the B-button to confirm.
